title: Dragon-tease JUICY ‚ÄĒ eye+flare+claws+vignette+tremor+BEWARE shake stack
hypothesis: A 6-effect synchronized juicy cascade (red dragon eye dilating + rotating lens-flare + screen-edge claw scratches + pulsing red vignette + cumulative tremor with spike on eye-open + scale-punched BEWARE! lettering) during the first 4.2s creates a high-density pattern-interrupt that crushes retention@5s vs the minimal eye+text v0.
diff_from_baseline: NEW playable/dragon_tease.js (~250 LOC) exporting drawDragonTease + getTremorOffset, with 6 sub-helpers (drawDragonEye, drawLensFlare, drawClawsLeft, drawClawsRight, drawVignettePulse, drawBewareLettering)

Effect 1 ‚ÄĒ Dragon eye: almond shape, reptilian vertical pupil dilating 0.6‚Üí1.0 over 600ms, blink cycle (200ms closed every 1.8s), radial iris gradient #5C0000‚Üí#FF1A1A‚Üí#FFB0B0 at (420,180) r=70
Effect 2 ‚ÄĒ Lens-flare: 8 rotating star branches (0.1Hz) length 80‚Äď150px, additive 'lighter' blend rgba(255,180,80) pulsing 0.7Hz in sync with pupil dilation, plus soft halo radial
Effect 3 ‚ÄĒ Claws: 3 black silhouette claws scratch-in from LEFT edge at +400ms (200ms reveal), 3 from RIGHT at +550ms; hold 1500ms then fade 400ms
Effect 4 ‚ÄĒ Vignette: red radial gradient rgba(180,10,10,0‚ÜíőĪ) center‚Üíedges, multiply blend, alpha pulse 0.7Hz amplitude 0.15‚Üí0.35

Effect 5 ‚ÄĒ Tremor: getTremorOffset(elapsed) returns 4Hz baseline 2px + decaying spike to 12px over +200..+450ms; script.js wraps drawDragonTease in a translate(sh.x,sh.y) so OVERLAY shakes (gameplay underneath stays stable)

Effect 6 ‚ÄĒ BEWARE!: italic bold 80px Arial Black at (270,700), double stroke (black 10px outer + dark-red 4px inner) + #FF2A2A fill, easeOutBack pop 0.5‚Üí1.20‚Üí1.0 over 350ms with ¬Ī6¬į rotation jitter, idle ¬Ī2¬į loop, fade 500ms at +3700ms
playable/script.js ‚ÄĒ added imports + invocation block in _paintOverlay BEFORE praise/CTA/instruction layers, gated to game.phase === 'intro' only, with tremor translate wrap
juicy_checklist_validated: screen-shake graduated (4Hz baseline 2px ‚Üí spike 12px on eye-open, decay 250ms)
particles 2+: lens-flare 8 branches additive + 6 claws scratch-in
color-shift: dragon eye iris dilation + reptilian pupil scale 0.6‚Üí1.0
glow-bloom: lens-flare 'lighter' composite + halo radial gradient on eye
trail persistence: vignette pulse 0.7Hz multiply blend running entire 4.2s
layered timing 3+ events (eye dilate +0, spike +200, claws-L +400, claws-R +550, BEWARE pop +900, fade +3700)
lettering BEWARE 80px italic bold double-stroke with shake + scale-punch
juicy_omitted: audio_stinger: shared/audio.js exposes only HTMLAudioElement ‚ÄĒ no WebAudio context for a clean 60Hz sub-pulse, skipped to keep bundle clean
